channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Jimmy Fallon and Dave Grohl Make Cameos in Nicola Coughlan’s ‘SNL UK’ Monologue
item.description:
[Intro music fades out]
Host: "Welcome to this week's entertainment update. This weekend, Foo Fighters are set to perform on SNL UK, but that's not the only exciting thing that happened on the show. Let's dive in."
[Short music transition]
Host: "Nicola Coughlan, star of Bridgerton and Derry Girls, hosted Saturday night's episode, and she got a surprise visit from none other than Jimmy Fallon. He popped up during her monologue, sharing a 'secret' about SNL: it's live, and as the host, she can do whatever she wants."
[Short clip of Jimmy Fallon's voice: "It's actually live. You can do whatever you want."]
Host: "With newfound confidence, Coughlan took a backstage stroll with Fallon, running into cast members along the way. But then, she spotted a familiar face: Dave Grohl, the Foo Fighters vocalist."
[Short clip of Nicola Coughlan's voice: "Jimmy. Jimmy. It's Dave Grohl."]
Host: "Fallon encouraged Coughlan to ask Grohl to be best friends, and in a hilarious moment, she shot her shot. And guess what? Grohl agreed, saying 'Sure, why not?' The two shared a high five and heart hands, and Coughlan was thrilled."
[Short music transition]
Host: "You can catch the full monologue, featuring Jimmy Fallon and Dave Grohl's cameo, on the official SNL UK YouTube channel. And if you're a fan of Nicola Coughlan, she's currently starring in the family film The Magic Faraway Tree, out now in the UK and coming to the US in August."
[Outro music starts playing]
Host: "That's all for this week's update. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next one."
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
